F

first() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.AbstractList
gets the first element in the list
first() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.List
Returns the element at the front of the list (index 0)
first() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.positional.PositionalLinkedList
The code for this method is based on the mergesort algorithm on page 277 in the course textbook "Data Structures and Algorithms" by Goodrich, Tamassia, Goldwasser.
first() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.positional.PositionalList
Returns a reference to the first Position in the list.
FIRST_ELEMENT_SELECTOR - Static variable in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.sorter.QuickSorter
Pivot selection strategy that uses the element at the first index each time a pivot must be selected
FirstElementSelector() - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.sorter.QuickSorter.FirstElementSelector
 
front() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.queue.ArrayBasedQueue
Returns (but does not remove) the front/first element in the queue
front() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.queue.Queue
Returns (but does not remove) the front/first element in the queue
